mapper.select: SELECT id, name, price, description, image, category, sales, stock, status FROM dish
SELECT id, name, price, description, image, category, sales, stock, status FROM dish WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dish (id, name, price, description, image, category, sales, stock, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{price}, #{description}, #{image}, #{category}, #{sales}, #{stock}, #{status})
